&o78y=18049&o79t=4&o79x=3&o79y=18346&o80t=3&o80x=48&o80y=18464&o81t=4&o81x=101&o81y=18724&o82t=3&o82x=21&o82y=18896&o83t=3&o83x=32&o83y=19930&o84t=1&o84x=20&o84y=19976&o85t=1&o85x=112&o85y=20070&o86t=5&o86x=19&o86y=20171&o87t=4&o87x=18&o87y=20319&o88t=4&o88x=126&o88y=20416&o89t=6&o89x=106&o89y=20474&o90t=3&o90x=22&o90y=20787&o91t=3&o91x=105&o91y=21088&o92t=3&o92x=35&o92y=21816&o93t=1&o93x=-1&o93y=22302&o94t=1&o94x=129&o94y=22341&o95t=1&o95x=-1&o95y=22383&o96t=1&o96x=133&o96y=22430&o97t=1&o97x=-13&o97y=22478&o98t=1&o98x=137&o98y=22525&o99t=1&o99x=137&o99y=22525&o100t=1&o100x=137&o100y=27525
